name: Mac & Cheese
description: Creamy cheddar cheese mixed with perfectly cooked macaroni, topped with crispy breadcrumbs. A classic comfort food.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: A classic pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil on a thin and crispy crust.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Romaine lettuce tossed in Caesar dressing, topped with croutons and parmesan shavings.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Al dente spaghetti with a creamy sauce made from egg yolk, pecorino cheese, pancetta, and pepper.

name: Veggie Burger
description: A juicy veggie patty served on a whole grain bun with lettuce, tomato, and a tangy sauce.

name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
description: Tender grilled chicken breast with avocado, bacon, lettuce, and honey mustard on a toasted bun.

name: Steak Frites
description: Succulent steak cooked to your preference, served with crispy golden fries and herb butter.

name: Sushi Roll Platter
description: An assortment of fresh sushi rolls including California, Spicy Tuna, and Eel Avocado.

name: Chicken Curry
description: Tender pieces of chicken simmered in a rich and aromatic curry sauce, served with basmati rice.

name: Vegan Buddha Bowl
description: A hearty bowl filled with quinoa, roasted veggies, avocado, and a tahini dressing.

name: Seafood Paella
description: A Spanish delicacy filled with saffron-infused rice, shrimp, mussels, and chorizo.

name: Pancake Stack
description: Fluffy pancakes stacked high, drizzled with maple syrup and topped with fresh berries.

name: Miso Ramen
description: A warming bowl of ramen with miso broth, tender pork, soft-boiled egg, and green onions.

name: Beef Tacos
description: Three soft tortillas filled with seasoned beef, fresh salsa, cheese, and sour cream.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: A rich and fudgy brownie, topped with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and chocolate sauce.

name: Lobster Bisque
description: A creamy soup made from lobster stock, aromatic vegetables, and a touch of brandy.

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Arborio rice cooked with a medley of wild mushrooms and finished with parmesan.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
description: Layers of breaded eggplant, marinara sauce, and melted mozzarella and parmesan cheeses.

name: Lemon Cheesecake
description: A creamy cheesecake with a tangy lemon flavor, served on a crumbly biscuit base.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy falafels wrapped in a warm pita with lettuce, tomatoes, and a tahini sauce.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender chicken pieces simmered in a rich, creamy tomato-butter sauce with aromatic spices. Served with naan.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with spiced chicken, caramelized onions, and saffron. A royal Hyderabadi delicacy.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts, peanuts, and a tangy tamarind sauce.

name: Lasagna
description: Layers of fresh pasta, rich Bolognese sauce, creamy béchamel, and melted mozzarella baked to perfection.

name: Tiramisu
description: Classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and a dusting of cocoa powder.

name: Garlic Bread
description: Toasted bread rubbed with garlic, drizzled with olive oil, and topped with fresh herbs and cherry tomatoes.

name: Samosa
description: Crispy golden pastry stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas, served with tangy mint and tamarind chutney.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Chargrilled paneer cubes marinated in yoghurt and spices, served with mint chutney and onion salad.

name: Chicken Wings
description: Crispy golden-brown chicken wings tossed in your choice of BBQ, buffalo, or honey garlic sauce.

name: Fish & Chips
description: Beer-battered fish fillet fried to crispy perfection, served with thick-cut chips and tartar sauce.

name: Waffles & Berries
description: Fluffy Belgian waffles topped with fresh strawberries, blueberries, whipped cream, and maple syrup.

name: Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed rice with vegetables, scrambled egg, soy sauce, and your choice of chicken or shrimp.

name: Ice Cream Sundae
description: Three scoops of premium ice cream with hot fudge, caramel drizzle, whipped cream, and sprinkles.

name: Chicken Shawarma
description: Juicy marinated chicken wrapped in a warm pita with pickled vegetables, garlic sauce, and fresh herbs.

name: Spring Rolls
description: Crispy fried rolls stuffed with seasoned vegetables and glass noodles, served with sweet chili dipping sauce.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Rich and creamy black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream, and aromatic spices. A classic Punjabi delicacy.

name: Tandoori Chicken
description: Succulent chicken marinated in yogurt and tandoori spices, roasted in a clay oven until charred and smoky.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy golden crepe made from fermented rice batter, stuffed with spiced potato filling, served with sambar and chutneys.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: A medley of mashed vegetables in a spicy tomato-based gravy, served with buttered bread rolls and fresh onions.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft, spongy milk-solid dumplings deep-fried and soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup. An iconic Indian dessert.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Fluffy deep-fried bread paired with spicy chickpea curry, garnished with onions and tangy pickle.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Fresh cottage cheese cubes simmered in a vibrant, creamy spinach gravy with garlic and Indian spices.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Crispy paneer and potato dumplings served in a rich, creamy tomato-cashew gravy with a hint of sweetness.

name: Aloo Paratha
description: Whole wheat bread stuffed with spiced mashed potatoes, pan-fried with butter. Served with curd and pickle.

name: Rasmalai
description: Soft, flattened cottage cheese dumplings soaked in chilled, cardamom-flavored sweetened milk with pistachios.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken tikka pieces simmered in a creamy, spiced tomato-based masala sauce. A global favorite.

name: Lamb Biryani
description: Aromatic basmati rice layered with tender lamb, caramelized onions, saffron, and fresh herbs.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet grilled to perfection with lemon, herbs, and served with seasonal vegetables.

name: Herb Crusted Fish
description: Delicate fish fillet coated in a fragrant herb crust, pan-seared and served with fresh green beans.

name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
description: Glazed teriyaki salmon served on a bed of steamed rice with pine nuts, microgreens, and sesame.

name: Pan Seared Sea Bass
description: Chilean sea bass pan-seared to a golden crust, served with a light basil garnish and citrus reduction.

name: Vietnamese Pho
description: Traditional Vietnamese rice noodle soup with aromatic broth, fresh herbs, bean sprouts, and tender beef.

name: Seafood Noodle Soup
description: A hearty bowl of noodle soup loaded with shrimp, herbs, and a rich, savory broth.

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Spicy and sour Thai soup with lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime, mushrooms, and juicy prawns.

name: BBQ Ribs
description: Slow-smoked pork ribs glazed with smoky BBQ sauce, served with fresh herbs on a rustic stone platter.

name: Lamb Chops
description: Premium lamb chops grilled to a perfect medium, served with rosemary jus and roasted vegetables.

name: Grilled Pork Belly
description: Crispy-skinned pork belly slow-roasted and grilled, served with mixed vegetables and tangy sauce.

name: Smoky BBQ Platter
description: A generous platter of smoky ribs, pulled pork, and sides on a rustic wooden board with signature sauces.

name: Greek Salad
description: Fresh cucumbers, tomatoes, red onions, and olives topped with crumbled feta cheese and olive oil dressing.

name: Mediterranean Bowl
description: A vibrant bowl with mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, olives, feta, and a drizzle of balsamic vinaigrette.

name: Chips & Guacamole
description: Crispy tortilla chips served with freshly made guacamole, corn salsa, and a creamy cheese dip.

name: Loaded Nachos
description: Crispy nachos loaded with melted cheese, guacamole, sour cream, salsa, and topped with fresh chives.

name: Curry & Naan Combo
description: Aromatic curry served in a traditional copper dish with freshly baked garlic naan. A complete meal.

name: Creme Brulee
description: Classic French custard with a crisp, caramelized sugar top, served in an elegant white ramekin.

name: Baklava
description: Layers of flaky phyllo pastry filled with chopped pistachios and walnuts, drenched in honey syrup.

name: Caramel Flan
description: Silky smooth custard topped with a luscious caramel sauce, garnished with fresh berries.

name: Indian Sweet Box
description: An assortment of traditional Indian sweets including gulab jamun, served in a festive clay pot.

name: Lentil Soup
description: Hearty and warming lentil soup with vegetables and aromatic spices, served with steamed rice.

name: Paneer Curry Bowl
description: Rich and creamy paneer curry served in a traditional clay bowl, garnished with fresh herbs and spices.

name: Yellow Dal Tadka
description: Comforting yellow lentils tempered with cumin, garlic, and ghee, served with steamed basmati rice.

name: Chicken Korma
description: Tender chicken pieces in a mild, creamy sauce with cashews, coconut, and fragrant cardamom.

name: Spicy Grilled Chicken
description: Juicy chicken marinated in a fiery spice blend, grilled with cilantro and lime. Perfect for spice lovers.

name: Dum Biryani
description: Slow-cooked biryani sealed with dough, infused with saffron, cashews, and aromatic whole spices.

name: Indian Thali
description: A grand platter featuring an assortment of curries, dal, rice, bread, raita, and traditional desserts.

name: Mughlai Biryani
description: Royal Mughlai-style biryani with tender meat, fragrant rice, yogurt, and lemon. A feast for the senses.
